hero.title: wuzu
hero.philosophy1: Journaling shouldn't be a solo journey.
hero.philosophy2: Facing a blank page, we often stop after one sentence—
hero.philosophy3: not because we have nothing to say, but because talking to ourselves is lonely.

companion.title: WUZU is your diary companion
companion.description1: A dog who chats with you. Write a paragraph, and it wags its tail in response.
companion.description2: Not cold AI analysis, but conversation like a friend.
companion.description3: It remembers what you've said, who you care about, and the ups and downs you've been through.

chat.title: Conversational Journaling
chat.description: No more staring at blank pages. Just chat about your day like you're talking to a friend.

emotion.title: 3D Emotion Understanding
emotion.description: Using the psychological AVD model to understand your emotions through energy, feeling, and control dimensions.

gratitude.title: Auto Gratitude Collection
gratitude.description: With each entry, Wuzu finds people and things to be grateful for. Over time, see the beauty in your life.

encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.description: Your diary is yours alone. Encrypted storage, absolute privacy.

anonymous.title: Anonymous Warm Connections
anonymous.description: Want to share? AI removes personal info for anonymous sharing. Those needing support are seen first.

review.title: Review & Analysis
review.description: See emotional patterns in quadrant charts, track gratitude lists. In low moments, your journal reminds you what you've overcome.

connection.title: Anonymous Dialogue, Genuine Connection
connection.description1: When you see someone's diary, you can leave a message.
connection.description2: No need to know who they are, or reveal who you are.
connection.description4: Someone read their story. Someone cares.

gamification.title: Make Journaling a Habit
gamification.description1: Earn heart points by journaling, dress up WUZU with new collars, hats, and outfits.
gamification.description2: Build streaks with consecutive journaling, unlock milestone rewards.
gamification.description3: From 3 days, 7 days, 30 days... all the way to 1000+ days.

dressUp.title: Dress Up WUZU
dressUp.description: Try different looks! Unlock more outfits with heart points in the App
dressUp.tip: Download the App and earn heart points by journaling to unlock these outfits!

cta.title: Start Your Journal
cta.description: A companion is listening. Just focus on what you want to say.

app.title: wuzu
app.subdescription: wuzu is your AI diary companion, helping you record life in the most natural way.

chat.title: Chat-based Journaling
chat.description: No blank page anxiety. Write your diary like chatting with a friend.

emotion.title: Deep Emotion Understanding
emotion.description: Powered by the AVD emotion model — not just happy or sad, but a deeper understanding of your feelings.

backup.title: Secure Data Backup
backup.description: Your diary is safely backed up in the cloud with a complete export system. Never worry about losing your entries.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us. Here's how we protect your diary.

dataCollection.title: Data We Collect
dataCollection.description: What information wuzu collects and how
dataCollection.content: wuzu collects the following data, all provided directly by you through your use of the app:

items.diary: Diary conversation content — The text you type during diary conversations with your companion.
items.voice: Voice recordings — Audio you record when using the voice diary feature (Android only). Recordings are transcribed to text and are not stored after transcription.
items.mood: Mood and emotion data — Derived from your diary content by AI analysis (valence, arousal, dominance scores).
items.gratitude: Gratitude entries — People and things to be grateful for, extracted from your diary by AI.
items.profile: Profile information — Display name, avatar preferences, and app settings you configure.
items.aiMemory: AI memory — Contextual notes the companion remembers from your conversations to provide personalized responses.

dataCollection.note: wuzu does not collect your real name, phone number, location, contacts, or any data from other apps on your device.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.content: wuzu uses encryption to protect your diary data. All data is securely stored in the cloud, and only you can access your journal entries.

backup.title: Secure Backup
backup.content: wuzu provides a comprehensive cloud backup system, ensuring your diary won't disappear if your device is lost or damaged. You can also export all your diary data at any time.

ai.title: AI & Third-Party Services
ai.description: What data is shared, who it is shared with, and how it is protected
ai.consent: Before your data is processed by any third-party AI service, wuzu asks for your explicit consent within the app. You may review this consent at any time in the app's settings.
ai.content: wuzu uses the following third-party AI services. All requests are routed through our secure backend servers — your device never communicates directly with these services.
ai.geminiData: Data sent: Your diary conversation text (the messages you type and the companion's responses). No account information, email address, device identifiers, or personal identity information is included.
ai.geminiPurpose: Purpose: Generating diary summaries, mood and emotion analysis, companion conversation responses, morning messages, and weekly reports.
ai.groqData: Data sent: Voice audio recordings you create using the voice diary feature (Android only). No account information or personal identity information is included.
ai.groqPurpose: Purpose: Converting voice recordings into text (speech-to-text transcription).
ai.footer: Your data is sent to these services solely for the purposes described above. It is not used for advertising, not sold to any party, and not used for training AI models. Data sent to third-party AI services is not linked to your personal identity or account. Each third-party provider is contractually and by policy required to protect your data with standards equivalent to or exceeding our own. You can review and delete your AI-related data in the app's Settings under "AI Memory".
ai.retention: Data retention: Diary text and voice audio are sent to third-party AI services in real time for processing and are not stored by these services beyond the duration of the request. No persistent copy of your data is retained by the third-party AI providers.

security.title: Security
security.content: We employ industry-standard security measures to protect your account and data, including end-to-end encryption and secure authentication to ensure your privacy is never compromised.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your information, please don't hesitate to contact us.

emotionModel.title: AVD Emotion Model
emotionModel.subtitle: Beyond just "happy" or "sad" — Wuzu uses three dimensions to truly understand how you feel.

why.title: Why not just "good mood" and "bad mood"?
why.description: Think about it: anxiety and sadness are both "unhappy," but they feel completely different. Anxiety makes you restless; sadness makes you want to do nothing. A single "unhappy" label can't capture the difference.
why.punchline: The AVD model uses three dimensions to precisely describe "what am I actually feeling right now."

dimensions.title: Three dimensions, one complete picture
dimensions.subtitle: Each dimension scored from 1 to 10 — together they form your emotion coordinate.

valence.name: Valence
valence.description: Does this feel pleasant or unpleasant? The most intuitive dimension.

arousal.name: Arousal
arousal.description: How "activated" are you? Both positive and negative emotions can be calm or intense.

dominance.name: Dominance
dominance.description: Do you feel in control? This is the key to telling anxiety (helpless) from anger (empowered).

examples.title: See it in action
examples.subtitle: Same emotion labels, very different 3D coordinates.

excited.label: Excited
excited.situation: Got the acceptance letter of your dreams

calm.label: Calm & Content
calm.situation: Curled up on the couch reading on a weekend

grateful.label: Grateful
grateful.situation: A friend quietly helped you out

howWuzu.title: How does Wuzu do it?

step1.title: AI auto-analysis
step1.description: After you write a journal entry, Wuzu reads your tone, word choice, and narrative to score all three dimensions automatically. No mood stickers needed.

step2.title: Build your emotion trajectory
step2.description: Scores from each entry form your personal trend chart. Discover hidden patterns like "Wednesdays are my most stressful" or "I'm always calmer after exercise."

step3.title: Seeing is the start of healing
step3.description: We're not here to "manage" your emotions. When you can see the full picture, understanding follows naturally.

howWuzu.note: Based on the PAD Emotion Model by Mehrabian & Russell (1974), a widely validated framework in affective psychology.

reference.title: Academic Reference
reference.citation: Mehrabian, A., & Russell, J. A. (1974). An approach to environmental psychology. MIT Press.
reference.note: The PAD / AVD model is widely used in emotion recognition, human-computer interaction, and mental health research, with cross-cultural studies validating its applicability.

contactForm.subtitle: Questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you!
